name: Neil, Team Hood
subject: Jim needs to hear from you (health care)
body:
|
---
For too long Mississippi's leaders have put partisan politics ahead of our families' needs, especially when it comes to health care.

**Hood for Mississippi
Health Care Survey**

Survey for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Number of questions: **6**
Time to complete: **3 minutes**

| ********[**BEGIN SURVEY**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ezuDT6jSTWLMKh6GA4HnoxDNk97c9b38MVnNNpFJJtM=/QEOH7JCS2fWRksovzg8Pxy-QW7XnGOAtLIUXeT4_jio=)********
---
Friend -- For too long Mississippi's leaders have put partisan politics ahead of our families' needs, especially when it comes to health care.

While rural hospitals are closing and hundreds of thousands of Mississippians still can't afford care, **the state has turned down over a billion dollars per year in federal support** that could be used to keep those hospitals open and get more people covered.

But Jim knows that **every Mississippian deserves access to affordable health care** , whether they live in the city, the suburbs, or the country. As governor, he'll make it a top priority to keep our rural hospitals open and make sure every Mississippi citizen has access to health care.

Taking federal support would mean not only keeping our rural hospitals open -- it would mean **extending health care coverage to the 300,000 Mississippians who still don 't have it**, too. And that's not to mention the thousands of medical jobs that would be created as a result.

**As governor, Jim will fight for our health care. But he wants to hear from you too.[Will you take his brief survey today and tell him what you think about Mississippi's health care crisis?](https://act.myngp.com/el/ezuDT6jSTWLMKh6GA4HnoxDNk97c9b38MVnNNpFJJtM=/QEOH7JCS2fWRksovzg8Pxy-QW7XnGOAtLIUXeT4_jio=)**

Thanks,
Neil

name: Abigail
subject: Protecting our country is not partisan.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/whWeXV4g4VkcGXYz6-7tIxufDEzh9t5EMYlef4Utpqw=/VdLAmgPfDMMo6mNM2k4xfeh66I7EULiyNebRrnO0ZW8=?refcode=BLU-footer)
---
Peter,

The integrity of our elections is at risk. **In 2016, the Russian government hacked a major political party and our elections infrastructure** , stole documents, and disseminated documents in an attempt to influence our electorate, while foreign actors working on behalf of the Russians systematically endeavored to sow dissension, disseminate misinformation and influence the American electorate. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/whWeXV4g4VkcGXYz6-7tIxufDEzh9t5EMYlef4Utpqw=/u7H9VdZ4JpiehVG3-lJHQM8bY4Wi_uKtBK5-kUBsXZk=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190713-1-EM&amount=25&amounts=25,50,100,250,500) In response to these attacks, a group of my colleagues and I created Task Force Sentry. This bipartisan task force has been meeting weekly to understand our country's vulnerabilities and craft legislation to strengthen our defenses and deter future attacks.

As a former CIA officer, I learned firsthand how our enemies can use social media and other tools to undermine our democracy, spread disinformation and fanaticism, and erode faith in our institutions. We must be prepared as a nation for future attacks and this task force is prioritizing that fight.

As we continue to meet, I'll update you on our fight. This is going to be crucial to protecting the 2020 election and those in the future.

Our campaign is moving forward and each day we're preparing for 2020 and what will likely be a tough race. Can I count on your support? | | | [ DONATE >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/whWeXV4g4VkcGXYz6-7tIxufDEzh9t5EMYlef4Utpqw=/u7H9VdZ4JpiehVG3-lJHQM8bY4Wi_uKtBK5-kUBsXZk=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190713-1-EM&amount=25&amounts=25,50,100,250,500)
---
Thanks for all that you do,
- _Abigail_

* * *
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/whWeXV4g4VkcGXYz6-7tIxufDEzh9t5EMYlef4Utpqw=/VdLAmgPfDMMo6mNM2k4xfeh66I7EULiyNebRrnO0ZW8=?refcode=BLU-footer&recurring=true) Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. subject: Resolute Reads
body:
President Donald J. Trump issued an executive order on Thursday that directs "all other departments and agencies provide the Commerce Department...." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=12ca007c06&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [Trump Officially Issues Executive Order to Tally Citizens Through the Commerce Department](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6cce594aa4&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
President Donald J. Trump issued an executive order on Thursday that directs “all other departments and agencies provide the Commerce Department with any information related to citizenship,” Julio Rosas and Jerry Dunleavy report. The President also “instructed the Commerce Department begin planning the administrative processes necessary to add the citizenship question to the census in 2030.”
---
|
---
| [Ivory Coast Passes Legislation Encouraged by Ivanka Trump](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6c5ed9d42f&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Associated Press_
“Ivanka Trump is applauding the recent passage of legislation in Ivory Coast related to changes she pushed during her April trip to Africa,” Jill Colvin and Alexis Adele report. “The country is in the process of updating its family code to make it more equitable to women — a move President Donald Trump’s eldest daughter and senior adviser praised as ‘a great step forward.’”

**More:** [Ivanka Trump’s women’s initiative announces $27M in grants](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6e136fb279&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [Homeland Security: We've Done All We Could with Limited Resources for Migrant Children](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9d41d5a4fd&e=3ee4985eea)
_-USA Today_
“Since last fall, the Department of Homeland Security has consistently stated that Border Patrol’s temporary holding spaces were not designed nor ever intended to detain the record numbers of migrants illegally crossing the border,” members of a bipartisan Homeland Security Advisory council write. “The Border Patrol did not cause this crisis; our broken immigration system did.”
---
|
---
| [Billions of Dollars for Iowa's Economy Hinges on U.S.-Mexico-Canada Trade Deal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8e6bfa6dbb&e=3ee4985eea)
_-Des Moines Register_
“The United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA) is a critically important trade policy for our country and the State of Iowa. The agreement will create a trade relationship between the countries that supports high-paying jobs for Americans and grows the North American economy,” Jay Byers, Mike Ralston, and Craig Hill write. “Therefore, we urge Congress to pass USMCA.”

**Agriculture Secretary Perdue** : [Why Trump alternative to NAFTA is good](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5801f2bc5f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [Trump Effort to Tackle Kidney Disease Could Have Big Impact on Georgia](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c5170f7634&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The Atlanta Journal-Constitution_
“No place stands to benefit more than Georgia if the Trump administration succeeds in its effort to transform kidney health in the United States. Millions in the state live with conditions that can lead to kidney disease and death,” Ariel Hart writes. “Advocates were thrilled when President Donald Trump signed an executive order Wednesday that would, among other things, promote organ donations and reshape kidney care. They said the disease has gone ignored too long.”

**President Trump:** [Get “Americans off these waitlists.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4a5fbfe0ef&e=3ee4985eea)

|

It's my job to help our fantastic field organizers and volunteers spread the word about our great Democratic ticket to as many folks as possible in northern Kentucky.

**So I can tell you that when we say we 're building the largest field operation in Kentucky, we mean it!**

But building that kind of operation is expensive. That's why we've got a ONE DAY GOAL to raise as much money as possible for our field fund so we can keep knocking on doors and making phone calls. Elections are always won the old-fashioned way: by knocking on doors, talking to folks where they are, and listening to what they have to say. **Can you chip in today to help us hit our goal and reach as many folks across the Commonwealth as we can?**

name: Maisha Fields, Team Hickenlooper
subject: Talk won't cut it. We need a track record.
body:
Just one of the reasons I'm with John is his comprehensive plan outlining real steps to fight gun violence across our nation. Will you share it now to raise awareness? | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377174a/691c9bd/6d0f3d2b/11a4018b/2025235706/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

Each year in the United States, 1,500 children are shot and killed and three million are directly exposed to gun violence, resulting in lasting trauma and psychological distress.

That's why, on Thursday, John traveled to Chicago for a roundtable with families impacted by gun violence.

The stories he heard were wrenching: small children watching their parents shot in broad daylight. Young people shot at while waiting for buses. Families hiding from gunfire in public places that should instead be safe havens, like parks.

**These tragedies take lives, and devastate survivors and communities, every single day.** Fighting the gun violence epidemic isn't an abstract battle. It's about getting real things done, as soon as we can, before the statistics get even worse.

**Just one of the reasons I 'm with John is his comprehensive plan outlining real steps to fight gun violence across our nation. Will you share it now to raise awareness?** [**_READ NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377174a/691c9bd/6d0f3d2b/11a40188/2025235706/VEsE/ "https://medium.com/@johnhickenlooper/my-plan-for-gun-violence-prevention-c1e6ea2f350c") My connection to this issue is personal, friend.

In 2005, just one week after his college graduation, my brother Javad and his fiance Vivian were brutally gunned down in Aurora, Colorado to prevent his testimony in a murder case. My mother, Colorado State Senator Rhonda Fields, was left with a void in her heart, and had to redefine normal. But her answer to the questions "Why Javad?" and "Why Vivian?" was to work tirelessly to strengthen gun laws and mental health services in Colorado.

**In this mission, John was a true ally, championing tighter gun laws in honor and recognition of families, including my own, who have lost loved ones to gun violence across Colorado and our nation.** In passing universal background checks and banning high-capacity magazines, John stood tall and strong against the NRA and other naysayers. And when my mother's life and mine were threatened because of our advocacy, he personally had state troopers provide a security detail to keep us safe.

**I 'm proud to call John a friend, my Governor, and to stand with him as the next President of the United States.** He is a courageous servant leader willing to be a voice for the voiceless and to build bridges of opportunity and wellness for all. And he is a leader who doesn't just talk, but gets things done.

Friend, John is the only candidate in this primary who's already accomplished what so many other people are talking about. On an issue this important, talk won't cut it. We need a track record.

[**_Will you take a moment to read about John 's plans to end our gun violence epidemic and share them now?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377174a/691c9bd/6d0f3d2b/11a40188/2025235706/VEsF/ "https://medium.com/@johnhickenlooper/my-plan-for-gun-violence-prevention-c1e6ea2f350c")

Join us today--enough is enough.

Thank you,
Maisha

Maisha Fields
Surrogates Director
Team Hickenlooper
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
---

PO Box 6377, Denver, CO 80206
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper 2020 team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377174a/691c9bd/6d0f3d2b/11a40189/2025235706/VEsC/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377174a/691c9bd/6d0f3d2b/11a40186/2025235706/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377174a/691c9bd/6d0f3d2b/11a40187/2025235706/VEsA/ "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377174a/691c9bd/6d0f3d2b/11a40184/2025235706/VEsB/ "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377174a/691c9bd/6d0f3d2b/11a40185/2025235706/VEsO/ "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--but if at any point you'd like to opt out, you can do so right [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377174a/691c9bd/6d0f3d2b/11a40182/2025235706/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please [_**update your information here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377174a/691c9bd/6d0f3d2b/11a40189/2025235706/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in").

Friend,

_Putting People First – it’s what this campaign is all about._

**Today, I am humbled and excited to officially announce that I’m running for re-election as your governor of the Great State of Indiana. **

**[So I’m asking: will you join me and Suzanne and keep the pedal to the metal for four more years? ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=66136185386a4eb1bd90bfc9b7c5028f&_e=KBEC3IHkR7HnSGIaRdTRBxRDoPrmLjWbsdfRQQTy5kvVIiMKNzhvi0hRxrM-wgEkRJ-DRmtqeLwqIc3J9hMnV5WbP17KRuJ5BCVQJvnUm8_0Z4SS2CKMzs3cpg_4WHOIw0BWBBzX8_LIULJLZ7PtoPbJxvjZZg7kct1HZ9T4ZkuRe8sSPZqkgWmlv-DaWEzmEWXQo5UzVzCCLMt1tiTz--AX2IwmdGK3pzmDFPYrt2CQHPp0dvZQdIgLA0EY_c-XE9ObLo-2sAJaAkKI14fctNkkeHQrU0gsTfS-TO_xU8y94vM578T3YVsweI_jl4gy4LsnugkdlqAqZ2-i66NV-1oijipWTQYFRse-69VJAu-Kxp-DaIpQWKsmmNFYhOKezvzIDodcT0F9j9UlqZzYgDio444dL1tPH80dus4lCys%3D)**

Ever since I’ve been your Governor, my goal has been to Put People First. And the results have been incredible.

And to prove that point, earlier today at the historic Hoosier Gym in Knightsville for our campaign announcement event, we had Hoosiers from each of our 92 counties with us. Because we don’t believe in lonely victories in Indiana.

We’re Putting People First by making Indiana the best place to find a job and start a career.

We’re Putting People First by creating an economic ecosystem that today ranks BEST in the Midwest.

We’re breaking new job commitment records year-after-year. We’ve tripled foreign direct investment here on Hoosier soil while maintaining our AAA credit rating. And we now have more Hoosiers working in the private sector today than at any other time in our state’s history.

Jobs are up and our unemployment is down. Our wages are up, our revenues are up, our reserves are up, our exports are up and our GDP is up.
[ **Donate to help me keep growing our economy** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=66136185386a4eb1bd90bfc9b7c5028f&_e=KBEC3IHkR7HnSGIaRdTRBxRDoPrmLjWbsdfRQQTy5kvVIiMKNzhvi0hRxrM-wgEkRJ-DRmtqeLwqIc3J9hMnV5WbP17KRuJ5BCVQJvnUm8_0Z4SS2CKMzs3cpg_4WHOIw0BWBBzX8_LIULJLZ7PtoPbJxvjZZg7kct1HZ9T4ZkuRe8sSPZqkgWmlv-DaWEzmEWXQo5UzVzCCLMt1tiTz-ysK7LpstVPb_ByHYbWwxG6nD1U_P7u_EVuqXhlBmAmLz-Vu1eqh8WwtWA5BoU0XFeA1ffFEYLV5mi-hh4qytP_bOD7DqcjNFtXTPmPdFCRVAo5p3cEvZpTi4aDFmWqOea7W9f4QRrsWncSZPqTnlggAounldQg0Xeefgf0mRhqXWL00tg4JbMhJ3zpXBizYOa85SrbvS0zSjiMDw5h2sD8%3D)
But Putting People First is also about investing in our infrastructure on an unprecedented scale and completing transformational projects border to border.

We’re finishing I-69 three years ahead of schedule. We’re making US 31 a true freeway. We’re bringing more nonstop flights to our statewide regional airports. We’re double-tracking the South Shore Line up in the Region, connecting us to the nation’s third-largest economy like never before.

And we’re Putting People First by connecting our rural communities, expanding rural broadband into unserved areas, bridging the digital divide that will realize billions of dollars in untapped economic potential for our state.
[ **Donate to help me continue expanding Hoosier infrastructure** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=66136185386a4eb1bd90bfc9b7c5028f&_e=KBEC3IHkR7HnSGIaRdTRBxRDoPrmLjWbsdfRQQTy5kvVIiMKNzhvi0hRxrM-wgEkRJ-DRmtqeLwqIc3J9hMnV5WbP17KRuJ5BCVQJvnUm8_0Z4SS2CKMzs3cpg_4WHOIw0BWBBzX8_LIULJLZ7PtoPbJxvjZZg7kct1HZ9T4ZkuRe8sSPZqkgWmlv-DaWEzmEWXQo5UzVzCCLMt1tiTz-wiB35sM-xjqD4RKM3fEcIDPUSvUeFGZUdU2-iRNtsxPJf6tNSDmHtFpWGg1XPi-5bdNBm1bYEDC-nkwI6aba1OhEFyEOwAeWMEDIe4MXbEbSTSKjh6lvcn7874ciNG4Nyoxzrj-UUIxZrCkuQcfmTzlfg5fn7oAx5PR60oPOJRGIgnjqeqqkxrUjDheN0VrMJdWxK9sg2EAAlIinH2PWBA%3D)
But it’s not just the economic numbers – as compelling as they are.

We’re Putting People First by investing in education and training at historically high levels, giving Hoosiers an opportunity to discover their own interests and lead lifelong fulfilling careers.

We’re Putting People First by helping our friends and neighbors in need, fighting for our most vulnerable and turning more have-nots into have’s.

We’re tackling our addiction crisis head-on on all fronts – enforcement, treatment and prevention – with our partners at the local and federal levels, where the rubber meets the road, block by block.

I am running for re-election as your Hoosier Governor | | | | ---|---|--- Friend, Putting People First – it’s what this campaign is all about. Today, I am humbled and excited to officially announce that I’m running for re-election as your governor of the Great State of Indiana. Ever since I’ve been your Governor, my goal has been to Put People First. And the results have been incredible. From the economy, to job creation, to infrastructure, to public health, to education – you name it. We’re making a difference and positively impacting the lives of Hoosiers all over our great state. And to prove that point, earlier today at the historic Hoosier Gym in Knightsville for our campaign announcement event, we had Hoosiers from each of our 92 counties with us. Because we don’t believe in lonely victories in Indiana. We’re Putting People First by making Indiana the best place to find a job and start a career. We’re Putting People First by creating an economic ecosystem that today ranks BEST in the Midwest. We’re breaking new job commitment records year-after-year. We’ve tripled foreign direct investment here on Hoosier soil while maintaining our AAA credit rating. And we now have more Hoosiers working in the private sector today than at any other time in our state’s history. Jobs are up and our unemployment is down. Our wages are up, our revenues are up, our reserves are up, our exports are up and our GDP is up. But Putting People First is also about investing in our infrastructure on an unprecedented scale and completing transformational projects border to border. We’re finishing I-69 three years ahead of schedule. We’re making US 31 a true freeway. We’re bringing more nonstop flights to our statewide regional airports. We’re double-tracking the South Shore Line up in the Region, connecting us to the nation’s third-largest economy like never before. And we’re Putting People First by connecting our rural communities, expanding rural broadband into unserved areas, bridging the digital divide that will realize billions of dollars in untapped economic potential for our state. But it’s not just the economic numbers – as compelling as they are. We’re Putting People First by investing in education and training at historically high levels, giving Hoosiers an opportunity to discover their own interests and lead lifelong fulfilling careers. We’re Putting People First by helping our friends and neighbors in need, fighting for our most vulnerable and turning more have-nots into have’s. We’re tackling our addiction crisis head-on on all fronts – enforcement, treatment and prevention – with our partners at the local and federal levels, where the rubber meets the road, block by block. disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
#
Team,
Yesterday, I spoke at the Montana Democratic Party state convention in Helena. I shared my vision for Montana and our nation and asked for the support of my fellow Montana Democrats.
**[](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-mt-dems-speech?refcode=em190713&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
[**Watch the highlights from my speech --then join my campaign and chip in $5 now.**](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-mt-dems-speech?refcode=em190713&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
In my remarks, I talked about my experience in Montana protecting vulnerable kids, teaching in our schools, serving in the military, and working for the people of Helena as their mayor. I've spent my life serving the people of Montana, and now I'm ready to serve them in the Senate.
Montana needs a Senator who represents all Montanans, listens to their issues and makes them their own. When you elect me as your next Senator, I will fight every day for regular Montanans, unlike my opponent who only fights for his rich donors, special interests and billionaires and Mitch McConnell.
But I can't win this fight on my own. It's going to take each and every one of us to turn Montana blue again. I am running against a multi-millionaire with backing from D.C. politicians and wealthy, out-of-state donors--but I am one of you. That's why I need you to stand with me now.
[**Watch the video from my speech, then contribute $5 to help grow my campaign.**](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-mt-dems-speech?refcode=em190713&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Thank you,
Wilmot Collins
**[watch the video](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-mt-dems-speech?refcode=em190713&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624

| | My plan drove the conversation on immigration in the Democratic debates -- and now, I'm being attacked for speaking out. [_**I hope you 'll take a moment to read about my immigration plan, then sign your name to show you have my back in supporting it >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce6d/3eb3e2fc/58de4fe5/744a6da9/27754995/VEsE/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/immigration-survey?source=20190713_em_pet_b1_castro_all_rs") My grandma came to America when she was just seven years old after being separated from her dying mother. I watched the pain of never getting to say goodbye haunt her even as a seventy-year-old woman. **I see her image in the children at our borders today -- children as young as infants ripped from their parents, locked in cages, and even "lost" in the system. ** My grandmother's memory -- and this president's defining failure -- has led me to this decision: [_**I wanted to tell you personally about my first groundbreaking policy proposal -- People First Immigration. I 'm asking you to sign your name and stand united with me in calling for an end to criminalizing desperation. >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce6d/3eb3e2fc/58de4fe5/744a6da9/27754995/VEsF/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/immigration-survey?source=20190713_em_pet_b1_castro_all_rs") I won't lie to you: My proposal is bold. But it's what our country needs. People First Immigration centers around 3 key principles: -No more family separation or children in cages -- _**period.**_ -Bring DREAMers and other undocumented folks out of the shadows -- _**full stop.**_ -Address the root causes of migrant crises -- _**this is key.**_ I promised you that I was the complete antithesis to Donald Trump. And People First Immigration makes good on that promise. [_**I need 50,000 signatures-strong before midnight to show the world that America demands an immigration system that restores our faith in people, and puts hatred and bigotry in our rear view mirror. Will you add your name? >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce6d/3eb3e2fc/58de4fe5/744a6da9/27754995/VEsC/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/immigration-survey?source=20190713_em_pet_b1_castro_all_rs") Talk soon, Julian

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

body:
President Donald J. Trump welcomed a group of digital communications leaders and online influencers to the White House on Thursday. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3b6f36ad15&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • July 13, 2019
---
| | |
# **Special edition: President Trump’s historic social media summit **

**President Donald J. Trump** welcomed a group of digital communications leaders and online influencers to the White House on Thursday, where he hosted a first-of-its-kind summit on the importance of freedom of speech online.

**“Each of you** is fulfilling a vital role in our nation: You’re challenging the media gatekeepers and the corporate censors to bring the facts straight to the American people.”

---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cabc121a80&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **Free speech and expression** are at the core of American democracy. Censorship is not. It’s unacceptable that conservative voices continue to be unfairly stifled by some of the largest, most powerful media and technology companies in the world. The President has pledged that this bias, dishonesty, discrimination, and suppression will not stand.

**While some in the media** claim that the issue of tech bias is fake—or only anecdotal—multiple tech companies have admitted or been found to engage in selective censorship:
* Facebook and Twitter have repeatedly engaged in the shadow banning of conservative voices on their platforms.

* In 2018, Facebook issued an apology for wrongly taking down a political ad promoting now-Sen. Marsha Blackburn’s (R-TN) campaign.

* Google employees admitted to debating whether to bury news of President Trump.

**The White House** is taking action to stand up for free expression—online and everywhere else. A digital tool launched by the Trump Administration in May drew more than 16,000 responses from Americans sharing instances of tech bias. Following this week’s summit, President Trump will soon be meeting with representatives from the major social media platforms to discuss unfair practices.

**President Trump** is also directing his Administration to explore regulatory and legislative solutions to protect free speech, which he announced at the summit on Thursday.

**“You communicate directly with our citizens** without having to go through the fake news filter,” the President told summit attendees. “It’s very simple. Together, you reach more people than any television broadcast network, by far. It’s not even close.”

**Joining** **the President** on Thursday were Members of Congress fighting to protect free expression online—both for conservatives and for every American. Sen. Josh Hawley (R-MO), Sen. Marsha Blackburn (R-TN), House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy (R-CA), and Rep. Dan Crenshaw (R-TX) all spoke about the importance of achieving more transparency, accountability, and freedom across online platforms.

**Mainstream media** says “there’s no censorship in social media”—they claim it’s “all made up,” Sen. Hawley said. “You and I know that that’s not true. You and I know the truth is that the social media giants would love to shut us down, they would love to shut us up ... and we can’t let them.”

**🎬** [Sen. Hawley says tech giants “have to quit discriminating against conservatives.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cbebfd1ce8&e=3ee4985eea)

**_New York Post_** : [President Trump slams tech companies for bias](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=78f12e0e04&e=3ee4985eea)

Trump welcomed a group of digital communications leaders and online influencers to the White House on Thursday. | | | | | The White House • July 13, 2019 | | | Special edition: President Trump’s historic social media summit President Donald J. Trump welcomed a group of digital communications leaders and online influencers to the White House on Thursday, where he hosted a first-of-its-kind summit on the importance of freedom of speech online. “Each of you is fulfilling a vital role in our nation: You’re challenging the media gatekeepers and the corporate censors to bring the facts straight to the American people.” | | Free speech and expression are at the core of American democracy. Censorship is not. It’s unacceptable that conservative voices continue to be unfairly stifled by some of the largest, most powerful media and technology companies in the world. The President has pledged that this bias, dishonesty, discrimination, and suppression will not stand. While some in the media claim that the issue of tech bias is fake—or only anecdotal—multiple tech companies have admitted or been found to engage in selective censorship: Facebook and Twitter have repeatedly engaged in the shadow banning of conservative voices on their platforms. In 2018, Facebook issued an apology for wrongly taking down a political ad promoting now-Sen. Marsha Blackburn’s (R-TN) campaign. Google employees admitted to debating whether to bury news of President Trump. The White House is taking action to stand up for free expression—online and everywhere else. A digital tool launched by the Trump Administration in May drew more than 16,000 responses from Americans sharing instances of tech bias. Following this week’s summit, President Trump will soon be meeting with representatives from the major social media platforms to discuss unfair practices. President Trump is also directing his Administration to explore regulatory and legislative solutions to protect free speech, which he announced at the summit on Thursday. “You communicate directly with our citizens without having to go through the fake news filter,” the President told summit attendees. “It’s very simple. Together, you reach more people than any television broadcast network, by far. It’s not even close.” Joining the President on Thursday were Members of Congress fighting to protect free expression online—both for conservatives and for every American. Sen. Josh Hawley (R-MO), Sen. Marsha Blackburn (R-TN), House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy (R-CA), and Rep. Dan Crenshaw (R-TX) all spoke about the importance of achieving more transparency, accountability, and freedom across online platforms. Mainstream media says “there’s no censorship in social media”—they claim it’s “all made up,” Sen. Hawley said. “You and I know that that’s not true. You and I know the truth is that the social media giants would love to shut us down, they would love to shut us up ... and we can’t let them.” 🎬 New York Post : | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 USA · 202-456-1111

name: Kamala Harris
subject: This email is about the ICE raids planned for Sunday. It is important.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
President Trump confirmed that Immigrations and Customs Enforcement (ICE) is planning deportation raids against immigrant families tomorrow. According to news reports, the raids will likely take place in cities including Atlanta, Baltimore, Chicago, Denver, Houston, Los Angeles, Miami, New Orleans, New York, and San Francisco. If you are targeted by an immigration official, I want you to know that you have rights. **[You can find more information about your rights and what to do if ICE is at your door here »](https://action.kamalaharris.org/go/11333?t=1&akid=5577%2E5755789%2EcxkVDi)** These planned raids are another prong in President Trump’s fear campaign against immigrant communities. Targeting people who have lived in our country for years and breaking apart families creates fear and mistrust. It does not make our communities safer. As a career prosecutor, I’ve heard it countless times from law enforcement officials. When people fear reporting crimes due to their immigration status, real criminals aren’t brought to justice and our communities are less safe. One of the best things we can all do right now is support the organizations doing the difficult work on the ground of protecting our immigrant communities. **[If you’re able, please consider making a contribution today to groups doing critical work on the ground. Pitch in here to make a split contribution between National Immigration Law Center, The Young Center for Immigrant Children’s Rights, and United We Dream Action »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-190713-immigration?refcode=ema190713-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=2&refcode2=5577_5755789_cxkVDi&akid=5577%2E5755789%2EcxkVDi)** Your donation today will benefit the following organizations tirelessly fighting to bring justice to our immigrant communities:
* **National Immigration Law Center (NILC)** is one of the leading organizations in the U.S. exclusively dedicated to defending and advancing the rights of immigrants with low income.

* **The Young Center for Immigrant Children’s Rights** is a human rights organization that advocates for the rights and best interests of immigrant children from all corners of the world.

* **United We Dream Action** is the largest immigrant youth-led community in the country, committed to providing immigrant communities with reliable information and useful tools and advocating for immigration policy changes.

Thank you, — Kamala Harris

---
PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). You received this message because you are subscribed to Senator Kamala Harris' mailing list. You can [adjust your email preferences here](https://action.kamalaharris.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails?t=3&akid=5577%2E5755789%2EcxkVDi), or [unsubscribe from receiving further emails here.](https://action.kamalaharris.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=5577%2E5755789%2EcxkVDi)
